docket_entries.description: ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL:[X] THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY DO, MAI AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF MAI DO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GILLIAN DOUGLAS, PARALEGAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DO, MAI
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DO, MAI AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED JUL-21-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-03-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
